c_arb.purpose: Primary interval/enclosure reference backend when C Arb/FLINT reference adapters are available.
c_arb.execution_surface: Linux, Windows, WSL local parity/compare runs

mathematica.purpose: Optional high-confidence symbolic/numerical reference backend for difficult special-function and asymptotic comparisons.
mathematica.execution_surface: local licensed install or Wolfram-enabled environment

mpmath.purpose: Portable high-precision point reference backend for benchmark and parity-style comparisons.
mpmath.execution_surface: Windows, Linux, WSL, Colab, GitHub Actions

scipy.purpose: Default float64 engineering parity/reference backend where SciPy provides the target function or sparse operator.
scipy.execution_surface: Windows, Linux, WSL, Colab, GitHub Actions

jax_scipy.purpose: Optional JAX-side comparison backend for engineering parity and fallback experiments.
jax_scipy.execution_surface: Windows, Linux, WSL, Colab, GitHub Actions

experimental_jax.purpose: Optional experimental JAX kernels and alternate implementations that are not part of the canonical runtime contract.
experimental_jax.owner: family-specific experimental modules and compare benchmarks
experimental_jax.execution_surface: Windows, Linux, WSL, Colab, GitHub Actions
